subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen speaketh in the Persian tongue, that all may attain unto the good-pleasure of God and act in accordance therewith [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی بلسان پارسی تکلم مینماید تا کل بمراد الله فائز شوند و باو عمل
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @exhortations and counsels, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
